what_it_does: A single-sentence README declaring this directory the evidence base for the claude-design pack, and establishing a precedence rule: where BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md covers the same seam/placement findings as the deep-reads here, the seam pack is the single source and the deep-reads must not be updated independently.
observations: One line, no frontmatter, no headings.
Names a sibling artifact BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md as the authority for overlapping seam/placement findings.
States a do-not-update-independently rule for the deep-reads when they overlap the seam pack.
standouts: Encodes a single-source-of-truth precedence rule in one sentence: seam pack wins over the deep-reads on overlapping findings.
conventions: Follows the repo's single-source / one-source-of-truth discipline by explicitly naming which artifact governs overlapping content.
Departs from the vault-conventions frontmatter schema (no frontmatter) — acceptable as a working-doc directory README.
notes: A one-liner declaring this dir the claude-design evidence base and pointing overlapping seam/placement findings to BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md as the authority.
questions: Where does BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md live relative to this directory?
Which specific deep-reads in this directory overlap the seam pack's findings?
purpose_vs_actual: Matches — it states what the directory is and the precedence rule, which is exactly its content.
apparent_themes: Single source of truth for overlapping findings
Evidence base / provenance for a design pack
intention_signals: Intends to prevent divergence between the deep-read research notes and the consolidated seam pack by fixing which one governs when they overlap.
contribution: Contributes the precedence rule for this research directory — that BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md is the source for overlapping seam/placement findings and the deep-reads defer to it.
summary_for_embedding: A one-line README declaring this directory the claude-design evidence base and stating that BACKEND-SEAM-PACK.md is the single source for any seam/placement findings shared with the deep-reads here.
intention_for_embedding: To prevent divergence by fixing the seam pack as the authority over the deep-read research notes on overlapping findings.
